description_long: This object consists of two cardboard parcels, one of which is open and contains several white rectangular items, possibly documents or folders. The boxes are made from brown corrugated cardboard and are sealed with beige packing tape along the top flaps. The closed box features printed symbols, including a recycling logo, an umbrella indicating protection from moisture, and arrows indicating the upright position. Both boxes have barcode labels on their sides, suggesting they are intended for shipping or storage. The open box has its flaps partially folded outward, revealing the contents inside, while the closed box is fully sealed and intact.
description: Two brown cardboard parcels, one open with visible white contents and one closed, both featuring tape, barcodes, and shipping symbols.
description_view_0: Front view of the open box, showing white rectangular contents inside and the closed box behind it.
description_view_1: Side view showing both boxes, with the open box's flaps extended outward and the closed box fully taped.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the closed box's printed symbols (recycling, umbrella, arrows) and the open box's contents.
description_view_3: Angled top view of both boxes, emphasizing the open box's interior and the closed box's taped top.
